## Checklist

- [ ] The branch name and pull request title follow `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] Behavior changes include focused tests.
- [ ] Tool or configuration changes include relevant documentation.
- [ ] Tests do not require a token, network access, or a mutable GitLab instance.
- [ ] No credentials or private certificates are included.
